name: Brussels-Capital Region (Belgium)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic blue of the historical Duchy of Brabant arms

description: A blue field bearing a stylised yellow iris (Iris pseudacorus) at the centre.
history: Adopted on 7 March 2016, replacing the 1991 to 2015 design (which used the same iris but on a different background). The iris symbol references the marshlands at the city's origin, which were full of wild yellow iris.

features.symbolism: the yellow iris is the symbol of the Brussels-Capital Region; the marshlands at the origin of Brussels were full of yellow iris, which gave the city its early name
